notes: #mw-pages li a yielded 200 rows on all three category list pages (seed + both must-transfer). No bot-wall encountered. bodyClass encodes page type reliably: category pages carry 'ns-14' (MediaWiki category namespace) whereas entry detail pages carry 'ns-0' (article namespace). The two must-refuse entry pages returned rows=0 as expected. Entry detail pages are structurally very different: they use abbr, dd, dl, cite tags heavily (linguistic definition markup) which are absent on category pages, and have dramatically higher span and a counts (dictionary: span 2486, a 1552; word: span 4003, a 2705 vs category pages: span ~1100-1170, a ~1130-1185).
